summary: Privacy policy page successfully renders with proper legal content structure, effective date, and navigation. The page follows the expected static document layout with back link, clear headings, and comprehensive privacy sections. Visual presentation uses appropriate typography hierarchy and maintains readability.

violations.description: Page background appears to be cream/white instead of the expected diner teal (#9fd8d2) for public marketing pages. Legal pages may use cream variants per M.universal.1, but this should be verified against the intended palette treatment.

actions: Verify that cream background treatment is intentional for legal pages vs. the teal background specified for public marketing pages
Confirm the effective date (2026-05-03) aligns with the current legal posture requirements
Validate that all required privacy policy sections are present and complete
